Uses of Package
neqsim.util.agentic

Packages that use neqsim.util.agentic
Package
Description
neqsim.util.agentic
Agentic engineering infrastructure for NeqSim.
  • Classes in neqsim.util.agentic used by neqsim.util.agentic
    Class
    Description
    AgentBenchmarkSuite
    Defines and evaluates standardized engineering benchmark problems for agent performance measurement.
    AgentBenchmarkSuite.BenchmarkProblem
    A single benchmark problem with expected reference solution.
    AgentBenchmarkSuite.BenchmarkReport
    Aggregate report for the full benchmark suite evaluation.
    AgentBenchmarkSuite.Difficulty
    Difficulty level of the benchmark problem.
    AgentBenchmarkSuite.ProblemCategory
    Category of engineering benchmark problem.
    AgentBenchmarkSuite.ProblemResult
    Result of evaluating a single benchmark problem.
    AgentFeedbackCollector.APIGap
    Record of a discovered API gap.
    AgentFeedbackCollector.FailureCategory
    Failure category for classification of session failures.
    AgentFeedbackCollector.SessionSummary
    Summary of a recorded session (lightweight copy for storage).
    AgentSession
    Tracks an AI agent workflow session from start to completion.
    AgentSession.Outcome
    Final outcome of the agent session.
    AgentSession.Phase
    Workflow phase in the task-solving lifecycle.
    AgentSession.PhaseRecord
    Record of a single workflow phase with timing.
    AgentSession.SimulationRun
    Record of a simulation run.
    AgentSession.ToolInvocation
    Record of a tool invocation.
    SimulationQualityGate.QualityIssue
    Represents a single quality gate issue.
    SimulationQualityGate.Severity
    Issue severity levels.
    TaskResultValidator.ValidationReport
    Report of validation results for a results.json file.
    TaskResultValidator.ValidationReport.Issue
    A single validation issue.
